flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Arkansas State University Three Rivers fell 10% between 2021 and 2024 (59.6% → 53.6%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Arkansas State University Three Rivers fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Arkansas State University Three Rivers rose 91% between 2009 and 2010 (10.5% → 20.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Arkansas State University Three Rivers rose 30% between 2021 and 2024 (424 → 550).
